opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I suddenly got this ripping, tearing pain in my chest that goes up into my jaw, and I nearly passed out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe tearing chest pain radiating to the jaw with a near-fainting episode.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden, about 30 minutes ago, came on instantly at maximum intensity
symptom_narrative.character: tearing/ripping sensation, unlike anything felt before
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: worst pain of my life, 10 out of 10
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest, radiating up into the jaw and slightly into the back between the shoulder blades
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since sudden onset, not related to exertion
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing specific noted, pain is unrelenting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: brief loss of consciousness/nearly fainting, sweating, feeling of impending doom
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no prior episodes like this; has a history of high blood pressure
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: unable to move without severe pain, spouse very frightened

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: prescribed but admits to inconsistent use

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: long history of poorly controlled high blood pressure, spouse present and very concerned

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: terrified, wants immediate pain relief and reassurance

access_barriers.transport: spouse present, but patient must not self-transport given syncope and severity
